titles.en: Chapter on the Time When Breaking the Fast Becomes Permissible and Prayer Becomes Obligatory
Chapter on the Time When Breaking the Fast Becomes Permissible and Prayer Becomes Obligatory

segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «إِذَا غَابَ اَلْقُرْصُ أَفْطَرَ اَلصَّائِمُ وَ دَخَلَ وَقْتُ اَلصَّلاَةِ.
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «إِذَا غَابَ اَلْقُرْصُ أَفْطَرَ اَلصَّائِمُ وَ دَخَلَ وَقْتُ اَلصَّلاَةِ.

segments:
Hadith.1932 - Amru ibn Shimr narrated from Jabir, from Abu Ja'far (as), who said that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"When the disk of the sun disappears, the fasting person may break their fast, and the time for prayer begins."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1932 - Amru ibn Shimr narrated from Jabir, from Abu Ja'far (as), who said that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"When the disk of the sun disappears, the fasting person may break their fast, and the time for prayer begins."

narratorChain.raw: 1932 - رَوَى عَمْرُو بْنُ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Time When Breaking the Fast Becomes Permissible and Prayer Becomes Obligatory

segments: «إِنْ كَانَ مَعَهُ قَوْمٌ يَخْشَى أَنْ يَحْبِسَهُمْ عَنْ عَشَائِهِمْ فَلْيُفْطِرْ مَعَهُمْ وَ إِنْ كَانَ غَيْرُ ذَلِكَ فَلْيُصَلِّ ثُمَّ لْيُفْطِرْ.
arabic.text: «إِنْ كَانَ مَعَهُ قَوْمٌ يَخْشَى أَنْ يَحْبِسَهُمْ عَنْ عَشَائِهِمْ فَلْيُفْطِرْ مَعَهُمْ وَ إِنْ كَانَ غَيْرُ ذَلِكَ فَلْيُصَلِّ ثُمَّ لْيُفْطِرْ.

segments:
Hadith.1933 - Al-Halabi narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he was asked about breaking the fast before or after prayer.
Imam (as) said: "If he is with a group and fears delaying their dinner, let him break his fast with them. Otherwise, let him pray first, then break his fast."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.1933 - Al-Halabi narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he was asked about breaking the fast before or after prayer.
Imam (as) said: "If he is with a group and fears delaying their dinner, let him break his fast with them. Otherwise, let him pray first, then break his fast."

narratorChain.raw: 1933 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ عَنِ اَلْإِفْطَارِ قَبْلَ اَلصَّلاَةِ أَوْ بَعْدَهَا قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ
